data.title: U.S. senators propose emissions tax on blockchain and AI data centres under clean cloud act
data.description:
12-4-2025 – A fresh legislative proposal has emerged from the U. S. Senate, aiming to slap emissions-based charges on data centres powering blockchain networks and artificial intelligence operations. Dubbed the Clean Cloud Act, this initiative, championed by Democratic Senators John Fetterman and Sheldon Whitehouse, seeks to rein in the ballooning energy demands of cryptocurrency mining and [
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/u-s-senators-propose-emissions-tax-on-blockchain-and-ai-data-centres-under-clean-cloud-act/

data.title: Tether Treasury Mints Additional USDT on Tron Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that Tether Treasury has minted an additional 1 billion USDT on the Tron blockchain. This development marks a significant increase in the supply of the stablecoin, which is widely used in cryptocurrency transactions and trading.

data.title: Ohio Authorities Recover $35,000 in Cryptocurrency Scam
data.description:
According to PANews, investigators from the Ohio Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) have successfully assisted a victim in Hamilton County in recovering $35,000 lost to a cryptocurrency scam. The funds were traced back to an incident in August 2024 involving an elderly resident from Delhi Township.

Authorities detailed the scam, explaining that a 73-year-old woman from Delhi Township received a pop-up message on her laptop, claiming her device had been hacked. Believing she was contacting a Microsoft hotline, she called a number provided in the message and spoke with scammers. They instructed her to withdraw cash and convert it into Bitcoin to fix her computer. Ultimately, the victim transferred a total of $41,750 through a Bitcoin ATM in multiple transactions.

The recovery of the funds marks a significant success for the BCI in combating cryptocurrency-related fraud, highlighting the ongoing risks associated with digital currencies and the importance of vigilance among users.

data.title: AIR (AI Governance Token) is listed on AstralX Exchange, and the increase after listing is 900%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of AstralX, AIR (AI Governance Token) was officially launched on the AstralX exchange at 16:00 (UTC+8) on April 11, 2025, opening the AIR/USDT trading pair. The listing increase exceeded 900%, ranking at the top of the 24-hour increase list.
It is reported that AstralX is a one-stop investment platform for global investors and institutions, covering multiple assets such as cryptocurrencies and ETFs, integrating cutting-edge technologies and open ecosystems, and providing high liquidity and security services.

data.title: CoinW launches Babylon (BABY) and launches $10,000 reward program
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: CoinW has officially launched Babylon (BABY) at 18:00 (UTC+8) on April 10, 2025, and has opened the BABY/USDT trading pair, and simultaneously launched the "BABY Bounty Event" with a total prize pool of up to 10,000 US dollars, covering three major sections: registration transaction rewards, transaction sharing, and invitation cashback.

data.title: Ethereum has processed $1.18 trillion in stablecoin transfers in the past 30 days, a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News In the past 30 days, Ethereum has processed stablecoin transfers worth $1.18 trillion, making it the 30 days with the largest stablecoin transfers in Ethereum’s history.

data.title: Over 119 Million Pi Tokens Set for Release by Month-End
data.description:
Over 119 million Pi tokens are scheduled to be released by the end of this month, marking a significant milestone for the cryptocurrency community and potentially impacting token availability and market dynamics.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/over-119-million-pi-tokens-set-for-release-by-month-end
